criteria.criterionText: Then it should publish an artifact containing:
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The Gherkin describes the expected artifact contents, but no actual artifact or manifest of its contents was provided for verification. `report.md` is only one file, not the full artifact.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide access to the published CI artifact, a manifest of its contents, or a log confirming its publication.

criteria.criterionText: And the pull request summary should link to the artifact.
criteria.llmObservationSummary: No evidence (e.g., screenshot, text excerpt) of the pull request summary was provided to verify the presence of a link to the artifact.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide a screenshot or text excerpt of the pull request summary showing the link.
